description: §23.2.4a E-FOREIGN-006 (crossing-shadow) — the `in:{ x }` crossing name becomes the emitted async-IIFE's parameter, but the slice ALSO declares a top-level `const x = 1` of the same name inside the block. That redeclares the IIFE parameter (`(async (x) => { const x = 1; … })(x)`), invalid JS, so the pre-emit syntactic scan (emit-logic.ts, opacity-preserving per §23.2.3) fires E-FOREIGN-006 naming the shadowed binding, per §23.2.4a.
